DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Westley (415-362-2817) for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Ruth Ballard Sneed (650-675-5704) for Defendant/Opposing party.

Hearing is held. The Court announces and explains the motions filed, the tentative ruling rule and the tentative ruling of the Court. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICKEY HAYWOOD DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Defendant to address issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to comply with CCP 430.41 in future, "[b]efore filing a demurrer pursuant to this chapter, the demurring party shall meet and confer in person or by telephone" Order submitted. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Westley (415-362-2817) for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Ruth Ballard Sneed (650-675-5704) for Defendant/Opposing party.

Hearing is held. The Court announces and explains the motions filed, the tentative ruling rule and the tentative ruling of the Court. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICKEY HAYWOOD MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is granted with leave to amend to address issues raised by the motion. Orders submitted. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
